sentences.t: 你要是饿了，就得吃东西。
sentences.en: If you're hungry, you have to eat.
sentences.r: Nǐ yàoshi è le, jiù děi chī dōngxi.

sentences.t: 我一起床总会吃点东西。
sentences.en: When I get up, I always eat something.
sentences.r: Wǒ yì qǐchuáng zǒng huì chī diǎn dōngxi.

sentences.t: 我得学习，但我不想。
sentences.en: I have to study, but I don't want to.
sentences.r: Wǒ děi xuéxí, dàn wǒ bù xiǎng.

sentences.t: 我病了，但我还得工作。
sentences.en: I'm sick, but I have to work.
sentences.r: Wǒ bìng le, dàn wǒ hái děi gōngzuò.

sentences.t: 我的航班六月十五号起飞。
sentences.en: My flight leaves on the fifteenth of June.
sentences.r: Wǒ de hángbān liùyuè shíwǔ hào qǐfēi.

sentences.t: 我不知道我想要什么，我什么都喜欢。
sentences.en: I don't know what I want; I like everything.
sentences.r: Wǒ bù zhīdào wǒ xiǎng yào shénme, wǒ shénme dōu xǐhuan.

sentences.t: 马可从不累，只是随时待命。
sentences.en: Marco is never tired, just ready.
sentences.r: Marco cóng bú lèi, zhǐshì suíshí dàimìng.

sentences.t: 我已经难受一个星期了。
sentences.en: I've been feeling bad for a week.
sentences.r: Wǒ yǐjīng nánshòu yí ge xīngqī le.

sentences.t: 有你在，我现在好多了。
sentences.en: I'm much better now that I'm with you.
sentences.r: Yǒu nǐ zài, wǒ xiànzài hǎoduō le.

sentences.t: 不，坐公交十分钟。
sentences.en: No, it's ten minutes by bus.
sentences.r: Bù, zuò gōngjiāo shí fēnzhōng.

sentences.t: 你不知道我对你的了解。
sentences.en: You don't know what I know about you.
sentences.r: Nǐ bù zhīdào wǒ duì nǐ de liǎojiě.

sentences.t: 我总想买些用不上的东西。
sentences.en: I always want to buy things I don't need.
sentences.r: Wǒ zǒng xiǎng mǎi xiē yòng bu shàng de dōngxi.

sentences.t: 出租车贵，坐公交吧。
sentences.en: The taxi is expensive, take the bus.
sentences.r: Chūzūchē guì, zuò gōngjiāo ba.

sentences.t: 天冷的时候我宁愿待在家里。
sentences.en: I'd rather stay home when it's cold.
sentences.r: Tiān lěng de shíhou wǒ nìngyuàn dāi zài jiā lǐ.

sentences.t: 我想再点一杯咖啡。
sentences.en: I think I'm going to order another coffee.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎng zài diǎn yì bēi kāfēi.

sentences.t: 在那边，拐弯然后直走。
sentences.en: It's that way, turn and go straight.
sentences.r: Zài nàbiān, guǎiwān ránhòu zhí zǒu.

sentences.t: 我小时候总跟朋友们在一起。
sentences.en: As a little kid, I was always with my friends.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎoshíhou zǒng gēn péngyoumen zài yìqǐ.

sentences.t: 我什么都没吃，因为我不饿。
sentences.en: I didn't eat anything because I wasn't hungry.
sentences.r: Wǒ shénme dōu méi chī, yīnwèi wǒ bú è.

sentences.t: 我头疼，因为没睡好。
sentences.en: My head hurts because I didn't sleep.
sentences.r: Wǒ tóu téng, yīnwèi méi shuì hǎo.

sentences.t: 我累得没法思考。
sentences.en: I'm so tired I can't think.
sentences.r: Wǒ lèi de méi fǎ sīkǎo.

sentences.t: 马可当然超爱西班牙语。
sentences.en: Marco loves Spanish, of course.
sentences.r: Marco dāngrán chāo ài Xībānyáyǔ.

sentences.t: 谁告诉你我说过那话的？
sentences.en: Who told you that I said that?
sentences.r: Shéi gàosu nǐ wǒ shuō guò nà huà de?

sentences.t: 到广场往左拐。
sentences.en: At the square, turn left.
sentences.r: Dào guǎngchǎng wǎng zuǒ guǎi.

sentences.t: 我是马可，我来自世界各地。
sentences.en: I'm Marco, and I'm from everywhere.
sentences.r: Wǒ shì Marco, wǒ láizì shìjiè gèdì.

sentences.t: 下周我时间多一点。
sentences.en: Next week I have more time.
sentences.r: Xià zhōu wǒ shíjiān duō yìdiǎn.

sentences.t: 听说这儿吃得特别好。
sentences.en: They say you eat really well here.
sentences.r: Tīngshuō zhèr chī de tèbié hǎo.

sentences.t: 我想认识一个会跳舞的人。
sentences.en: I want to meet someone who knows how to dance.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎng rènshi yí ge huì tiàowǔ de rén.

sentences.t: 带着行李箱，还是别走路了。
sentences.en: With suitcases, better not walk.
sentences.r: Dàizhe xínglixiāng, háishi bié zǒulù le.

sentences.t: 我以前更喜欢，现在没那么喜欢了。
sentences.en: I used to like it more, now not so much.
sentences.r: Wǒ yǐqián gèng xǐhuan, xiànzài méi nàme xǐhuan le.

sentences.t: 你不用完美，你只要练习就行。
sentences.en: You don't need to be perfect, you just need to practice.
sentences.r: Nǐ bú yòng wánměi, nǐ zhǐyào liànxí jiù xíng.

sentences.t: 我很开心，因为我终于学起来了。
sentences.en: I'm happy because I'm finally learning.
sentences.r: Wǒ hěn kāixīn, yīnwèi wǒ zhōngyú xué qǐlái le.

sentences.t: 马可希望你每天都练习。
sentences.en: Marco wants you to practice every day.
sentences.r: Marco xīwàng nǐ měitiān dōu liànxí.

sentences.t: 等一切都平静下来我就回来。
sentences.en: I'll come back when everything's calm.
sentences.r: Děng yíqiè dōu píngjìng xiàlái wǒ jiù huílái.

sentences.t: 我会的语言越多，认识的世界就越大。
sentences.en: The more languages I know, the more of the world I get to know.
sentences.r: Wǒ huì de yǔyán yuè duō, rènshi de shìjiè jiù yuè dà.

sentences.t: 你答应我件事，我就把这个给你。
sentences.en: I'll give you this if you promise me something.
sentences.r: Nǐ dāying wǒ jiàn shì, wǒ jiù bǎ zhège gěi nǐ.

sentences.t: 我们点太多了，账单看着都吓人。
sentences.en: We ordered so much that the check is scary.
sentences.r: Wǒmen diǎn tài duō le, zhàngdān kànzhe dōu xiàrén.

sentences.t: 我喜欢下雨天待在家里。
sentences.en: I like being home when it rains.
sentences.r: Wǒ xǐhuan xiàyǔ tiān dāi zài jiā lǐ.

sentences.t: 今天不行，明天也不行，还是周五吧。
sentences.en: Not today, not tomorrow either; Friday is better.
sentences.r: Jīntiān bùxíng, míngtiān yě bùxíng, háishi zhōuwǔ ba.

sentences.t: 这个月我有好多东西要付钱。
sentences.en: I have to pay for a lot of things this month.
sentences.r: Zhège yuè wǒ yǒu hǎoduō dōngxi yào fùqián.

sentences.t: 我不喜欢，因为太长了。
sentences.en: I didn't like it because it was too long.
sentences.r: Wǒ bù xǐhuan, yīnwèi tài cháng le.

sentences.t: 我便宜卖，因为我用不上。
sentences.en: I'm selling it cheap because I don't use it.
sentences.r: Wǒ piányi mài, yīnwèi wǒ yòng bu shàng.

sentences.t: 你可以跟我说实话，我不会生气。
sentences.en: You can tell me the truth, I won't get mad.
sentences.r: Nǐ kěyǐ gēn wǒ shuō shíhuà, wǒ bú huì shēngqì.

sentences.t: 马可说重复就是关键。
sentences.en: Marco says repeating is the key.
sentences.r: Marco shuō chóngfù jiùshì guānjiàn.

sentences.t: 我们一起结账吧，这样更便宜。
sentences.en: Let's all pay together, that way it's cheaper.
sentences.r: Wǒmen yìqǐ jiézhàng ba, zhèyàng gèng piányi.

sentences.t: 我买了两个，因为一起买更便宜。
sentences.en: I bought two because they were cheaper together.
sentences.r: Wǒ mǎi le liǎng ge, yīnwèi yìqǐ mǎi gèng piányi.

sentences.t: 我今天挺好的，比昨天好多了。
sentences.en: I'm good today, much better than yesterday.
sentences.r: Wǒ jīntiān tǐng hǎo de, bǐ zuótiān hǎoduō le.

sentences.t: 我想去，但我今天去不了。
sentences.en: I'd like to go, but I can't today.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎng qù, dàn wǒ jīntiān qù bu liǎo.

sentences.t: 要是早睡，我起来就更精神。
sentences.en: If I go to bed early, I get up feeling better.
sentences.r: Yàoshi zǎo shuì, wǒ qǐlái jiù gèng jīngshén.

sentences.t: 有点贵，但还行。
sentences.en: It's a bit expensive, but it's fine.
sentences.r: Yǒudiǎn guì, dàn hái xíng.

sentences.t: 忙的时候日子过得很快。
sentences.en: When I'm busy, the day goes by fast.
sentences.r: Máng de shíhou rìzi guò de hěn kuài.

sentences.t: 睡得好的时候，我工作学习都更好。
sentences.en: When I sleep well, I work and study better.
sentences.r: Shuì de hǎo de shíhou, wǒ gōngzuò xuéxí dōu gèng hǎo.

sentences.t: 我洗澡很快，因为我得工作。
sentences.en: I shower fast because I have to work.
sentences.r: Wǒ xǐzǎo hěn kuài, yīnwèi wǒ děi gōngzuò.

sentences.t: 我没事，但她累了。
sentences.en: I'm fine, but she's tired.
sentences.r: Wǒ méishì, dàn tā lèi le.

sentences.t: 我现在忙，但待会儿就有空了。
sentences.en: I'm busy now, but later I'm free.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiànzài máng, dàn dāihuìr jiù yǒu kòng le.

sentences.t: 他是个挺淡定的人，但现在很紧张。
sentences.en: He's a calm guy, but right now he's nervous.
sentences.r: Tā shì ge tǐng dàndìng de rén, dàn xiànzài hěn jǐnzhāng.

sentences.t: 我想睡觉，但也想跟你出去。
sentences.en: I want to sleep, but I also want to go out with you.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎng shuìjiào, dàn yě xiǎng gēn nǐ chūqù.

sentences.t: 我难过的时候就找朋友聊聊。
sentences.en: If I'm sad, I talk to a friend.
sentences.r: Wǒ nánguò de shíhou jiù zhǎo péngyou liáoliao.

sentences.t: 你不舒服的话，就去看医生。
sentences.en: If you feel bad, go to the doctor.
sentences.r: Nǐ bù shūfu de huà, jiù qù kàn yīshēng.

sentences.t: 她是个开朗的人，但今天很难过。
sentences.en: She's a cheerful person, but today she's sad.
sentences.r: Tā shì ge kāilǎng de rén, dàn jīntiān hěn nánguò.

sentences.t: 我是个开朗的人，虽然有时候会累。
sentences.en: I'm a cheerful person, even if sometimes I'm tired.
sentences.r: Wǒ shì ge kāilǎng de rén, suīrán yǒu shíhou huì lèi.

sentences.t: 渴了就得喝水。
sentences.en: You have to drink water if you're thirsty.
sentences.r: Kě le jiù děi hē shuǐ.

sentences.t: 别问我为什么，但它就是有用。
sentences.en: Don't ask me why, but it works.
sentences.r: Bié wèn wǒ wèishénme, dàn tā jiùshì yǒuyòng.

sentences.t: 马可说他洗澡的时候都在学习。
sentences.en: Marco says he studies while he showers.
sentences.r: Marco shuō tā xǐzǎo de shíhou dōu zài xuéxí.

sentences.t: 我跟你说了，但你没听我的。
sentences.en: I told you, but you didn't listen to me.
sentences.r: Wǒ gēn nǐ shuō le, dàn nǐ méi tīng wǒ de.

sentences.t: 我会这首歌，但唱不出来。
sentences.en: I know the song, but I can't sing it.
sentences.r: Wǒ huì zhè shǒu gē, dàn chàng bu chūlái.

sentences.t: 我会做饭，但不会这道菜。
sentences.en: I know how to cook, but I don't know this recipe.
sentences.r: Wǒ huì zuòfàn, dàn bú huì zhè dào cài.

sentences.t: 我把号码给他了，但他从没打过。
sentences.en: I gave him my number, but he never called.
sentences.r: Wǒ bǎ hàomǎ gěi tā le, dàn tā cóng méi dǎ guò.

sentences.t: 你好好找，就能找到。
sentences.en: If you look properly, you'll find it.
sentences.r: Nǐ hǎohǎo zhǎo, jiù néng zhǎodào.

sentences.t: 来，尝尝这个，你会喜欢的。
sentences.en: Here, try this, you're going to like it.
sentences.r: Lái, chángchang zhège, nǐ huì xǐhuan de.

sentences.t: 我找了半天答案，结果我早就知道。
sentences.en: I looked for the answer, but I already knew it.
sentences.r: Wǒ zhǎo le bàntiān dá'àn, jiéguǒ wǒ zǎo jiù zhīdào.

sentences.t: 我看到的时候简直不敢相信。
sentences.en: When I saw it, I couldn't believe it.
sentences.r: Wǒ kàndào de shíhou jiǎnzhí bùgǎn xiāngxìn.

sentences.t: 我从没试过这个，但太棒了。
sentences.en: I'd never tried this, but it's amazing.
sentences.r: Wǒ cóng méi shì guò zhège, dàn tài bàng le.

sentences.t: 你不休息的话，会更难受。
sentences.en: If you don't rest, you'll feel worse.
sentences.r: Nǐ bù xiūxi de huà, huì gèng nánshòu.

sentences.t: 厨房在我房间旁边。
sentences.en: The kitchen's next to my room.
sentences.r: Chúfáng zài wǒ fángjiān pángbiān.

sentences.t: 我早起，好在上班前学习。
sentences.en: I get up early to study before work.
sentences.r: Wǒ zǎoqǐ, hǎo zài shàngbān qián xuéxí.

sentences.t: 我不知道我几点回来。
sentences.en: I don't know what time I'll be back.
sentences.r: Wǒ bù zhīdào wǒ jǐ diǎn huílái.

sentences.t: 卫生间在厨房旁边。
sentences.en: The bathroom's next to the kitchen.
sentences.r: Wèishēngjiān zài chúfáng pángbiān.

sentences.t: 她跟猫一起在沙发上。
sentences.en: She's on the couch with the cat.
sentences.r: Tā gēn māo yìqǐ zài shāfā shàng.

sentences.t: 我睡得晚，然后又不想起床。
sentences.en: I go to bed late and then I don't want to get up.
sentences.r: Wǒ shuì de wǎn, ránhòu yòu bù xiǎng qǐchuáng.

sentences.t: 有时候我什么都不想干。
sentences.en: Sometimes I feel like doing nothing.
sentences.r: Yǒu shíhou wǒ shénme dōu bù xiǎng gàn.

sentences.t: 马可早起，学五门语言。
sentences.en: Marco gets up early and studies five languages.
sentences.r: Marco zǎoqǐ, xué wǔ mén yǔyán.

sentences.t: 沙发在窗户旁边。
sentences.en: The couch is next to the window.
sentences.r: Shāfā zài chuānghu pángbiān.

sentences.t: 周日我去我妈那儿了。
sentences.en: I went to my mom's place on Sunday.
sentences.r: Zhōurì wǒ qù wǒ mā nàr le.

sentences.t: 我喜欢睡前看一会儿书。
sentences.en: I like to read a little before sleeping.
sentences.r: Wǒ xǐhuan shuì qián kàn yíhuìr shū.

sentences.t: 下次我会早点来。
sentences.en: I'm going to come earlier next time.
sentences.r: Xià cì wǒ huì zǎodiǎn lái.

sentences.t: 你打算几点从那儿走？
sentences.en: What time are you going to leave there?
sentences.r: Nǐ dǎsuàn jǐ diǎn cóng nàr zǒu?

sentences.t: 我想在三十岁前看看世界。
sentences.en: I want to see the world before I turn thirty.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎng zài sānshí suì qián kànkan shìjiè.

sentences.t: 马可每天早上六点练西班牙语。
sentences.en: Marco practices Spanish at six every morning.
sentences.r: Marco měitiān zǎoshang liù diǎn liàn Xībānyáyǔ.

sentences.t: 马可看着我说：再练一遍。
sentences.en: Marco looked at me and said: practice again.
sentences.r: Marco kànzhe wǒ shuō: zài liàn yí biàn.

sentences.t: 狗总是睡在我床底下。
sentences.en: The dog always sleeps under my bed.
sentences.r: Gǒu zǒngshì shuì zài wǒ chuáng dǐxia.

sentences.t: 窗户在门旁边。
sentences.en: The window's next to the door.
sentences.r: Chuānghu zài mén pángbiān.

sentences.t: 我没钱再买别的了。
sentences.en: I don't have any money left to buy anything else.
sentences.r: Wǒ méi qián zài mǎi bié de le.

sentences.t: 我头疼了一整天。
sentences.en: I've had a headache all day.
sentences.r: Wǒ tóu téng le yì zhěng tiān.
